case_title: A CLASS LIMOUSINE CORP. VS. DEREK GORDON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF A CLASS LIMOUSINE CORP.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR MORE EVIDENCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF A CLASS LIMOUSINE CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GORDON, DEREK $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,185.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY A CLASS LIMOUSINE CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, DEREK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $135.00) SERVED SEP-16-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, DEREK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-26-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF A CLASS LIMOUSINE CORP. REPRESENTED BY STANLEY KWAN, OWNER. DEFENDANT DEREK GORDON DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF WAIVES DAMAGE AWARD ABOVE 5K LIMITATION OF THIS COURT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED - DECLARATION. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF A CLASS LIMOUSINE CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2018 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO NOV-26-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF A CLASS LIMOUSINE CORP. REPRESENTED BY STANLEY KWAN, OWNER. DEFENDANT DEREK GORDON DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF SHALL SUBMIT A DECLARATION CONCERNING DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS AND WHY SERVICE WAS PROPERLY MADE AT 28 ATALAYA TERRANCE ON OR BEFORE THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF NEED NOT APPEAR AT THE CONTINUED HEARING, BUT EITHER PARTY MAY APPEAR IF IT/HE CHOOSES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-26-2018 - JUDGMENT.
